name: Kawasaki Thermal Engineering Co., Ltd.
summary: Kawasaki Thermal Engineering Co., Ltd. engages in the manufacture and sale of absorption chillers and package boilers in Japan and internationally. It offers absorption chillers, such as double and triple effect direct fired, double effect steam, and single effect hot water absorption chillers; and package boilers, including multi tube once-through, and water and smoke tube boilers, as well as heat recovery steam generators. The company also was founded in 1896 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan. Kawasaki Thermal Engineering Co., Ltd. operates as a subsidiary of Kawasaki Heavy Industries, Ltd.
